phase1.audience_analysis: As a top-tier manga editor with millions of copies sold, I'm preparing a web-savvy serialized manga targeting: ${TARGET_AUDIENCE}. Please analyze: 1) 3 most painful emotional pain points; 2) favorite 'unconventional/psycho' character archetypes; 3) 3 manga core ideas with strong 'contrast moe' or realistic satire.
phase1.topic_generation: Generate 3 manga topics with strong contrast using formula: '[Classic/Fantasy setting] + [Ultra-realistic modern pain]'. Each includes: title, logline, biggest comedy conflict point.

phase2.world_rules: Based on idea: ${LOGLINE}. Please set: 1) 3 absolute unbreakable world-building iron rules (must create trouble for protagonist); 2) 2 main factions with absurd conflict reason; 3) 1 unique daily phenomenon.
phase2.volume_outline: Design Volume 1 (episodes 1-10) outline with 'introduction-development-climax-conclusion' structure. Requirements: protagonist's small goal; 1-10 core events (each with small obstacle); massive cliffhanger at episode 10.

phase3.character_dna: Build character DNA archive for ${ROLE}: 1) Surface desire vs deep need; 2) Fatal weakness; 3) Signature action/catchphrase; 4) [IMPORTANT] Nano Banana 2 English image generation prompt (5-8 precise appearance tags).
phase3.character_arc: Design ${CHARACTER}'s character arc in Volume 1: initial faith/flaw, 'dark night of the soul' event, new understanding at end.

phase4.scene_setup: Scene: ${SCENE_DESC}. Provide: fixed angles and layout, detailed environment details, Nano Banana 2 English prompt.
phase4.prop_definition: Prop: ${PROP_DESC}. Provide: appearance description, symbolic meaning, Nano Banana 2 English prompt.
phase4.atmosphere: Emotion type: ${EMOTION}. Provide: visual expression of emotion, screentone/line usage, Nano Banana 2 English prompt (pure emotion, no character).

phase5.episode_script: Convert episode ${EPISODE_NUM} outline '${SUMMARY}' to 6-page manga storyboard script. Format: [Page X] Panel: (shot type) visual description; Dialogue: (concise, web-savvy); SFX: ...
phase5.cliffhanger: Design strong 'page-turning' cliffhanger ending for episode ${EPISODE_NUM}. Context: ${CONTEXT}. Must make readers迫不及待 to see next episode. Provide visual description and dialogue.

phase6.dialogue_humanize: This dialogue is too AI-sounding: ${DIALOGUE}. Rewrite: more colloquial, fits ${PERSONA} personality, add pauses/speech particles, add witty tsukkomi or internet meme.
phase6.god_tier_memory: Design a 'god-tier' hilarious/reversal plot. Context: ${CONTEXT}. Requirements: human brain-fart ideas, strong contrast or absurdity, relatable and viral.
phase6.layout_break: Design break-frame suggestions for '${CONTENT}': What elements can break out of panels? How can layout enhance emotional expression? Specific composition suggestions?

common.style_base: Vertical black and white Japanese manga page, screentone shading, high contrast line art, single manga panel, monochrome,
common.visual_anchor_warn: WARNING: English tags below must be included every time, never modify!
